title: Add visible subgraph overlay controls
description: Subgraphs can now be toggled as Add info backgrounds and collapsed/expanded by clicking, while overall SVG icons are scaled up for readability.
decision_notes: Reintroduced subgraph as an explicit Add info overlay without changing the default overview geometry.
Subgraph areas render as borderless translucent backgrounds with their own labels, separate from zone and boundary semantics.
Clicking a visible subgraph background collapses it into the existing abstraction representative; clicking that representative expands it again.
Collapsed subgraph representatives reuse the member-icon grid introduced for zones, and icon sizes were increased to roughly 1.8x globally.
Abstraction node sizing was expanded so larger member icons fit by growing the component instead of clipping.
verification: Local generated SVG check confirmed subgraph overlay and collapsed subgraph representative output; port 4174 server is still listening.
